vocab.example: I was drawn to this major because it offers a multidisciplinary approach, blending psychology with data analytics.

vocab.meaning: đảm bảo sự nghiệp bền vững trong tương lai (tránh bị lạc hậu)
vocab.example: Choosing Cybersecurity was a strategic move to future-proof my career in an increasingly digitized world.

vocab.meaning: sự tò mò/ham học hỏi về trí tuệ
vocab.example: My decision was primarily fueled by a deep intellectual curiosity about how global financial markets operate.

vocab.meaning: một sự tiến triển tự nhiên (từ sở thích hoặc nền tảng có sẵn)
vocab.example: Studying literature was a natural progression for me, given my lifelong obsession with storytelling.
I chose Biomedical Engineering to bridge the gap between advanced technology and practical healthcare solutions.
I majored in logic because I believe it is the bedrock of all rational decision-making and scientific inquiry.

vocab.meaning: phù hợp với tầm nhìn dài hạn
vocab.example: Selecting Urban Planning was essential to comply with my long-term vision of building sustainable cities.

vocab.meaning: một mối quan tâm bao quát/xuyên suốt
vocab.example: I have an overarching interest in human rights, which made Law the most obvious choice for my undergraduate studies.

vocab.meaning: trao quyền/cho phép tôi làm gì
vocab.example: I felt that a degree in Social Work would empower me to make a tangible difference in marginalized communities.

vocab.meaning: khung lý thuyết/nền tảng lý luận
vocab.example: The program provides a robust theoretical framework that I can apply to solve complex organizational issues.
